heading: Cost accounting standards
label: 9009 Cost accounting standards
text: The cost accounting standards issued pursuant to section 1502(a) and (b) of title 41 shall not apply with respect to a long-term care insurance contract under this chapter.
notes: Amendments2011— substituted “section 1502(a) and (b) of title 41” for “section 26(f) of the Office of Federal Procurement Policy Act ()”.Pub. L. 111–35041 U.S.C. 422(f)
amendments: Amendments2011— substituted “section 1502(a) and (b) of title 41” for “section 26(f) of the Office of Federal Procurement Policy Act ()”.Pub. L. 111–35041 U.S.C. 422(f)
